message:
fix(config): redirect unsafe-palette warning from stdout to stderr

MergeConfig was using fmt.Printf to warn about unsafe project palette
paths, which polluted stdout and broke machine-readable (JSON/robot)
output streams. Switch to log.Printf so the warning goes to stderr
instead. Update the test to capture stdout and assert it stays clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
